parents.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_read_only into OBDF_READ_ONLY

commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_need_scrub into OBDF_NEED_SCRUB
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_need_scrub into OBDF_NEED_SCRUB

Change the use of the odb_need_scrub bitfield into a bit in
the ofd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Build-Parameters: distro=el9.3 arch=x86_64
Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ibf3cb4a8bef8ba3844c0ccf094135a7b2d5221ec
